name: QuickDownload
description: Adds a quality-selection download button to Jellyfin item detail pages.
overview: Download movies and episodes directly from the detail page. Choose transcoded quality (H.264/AAC) or download the original file.

versions.changelog: Fix plugin script never loading — inject plugin.js into index.html at server startup via IHostedService.
Initial release — quality dropdown, transcode download, original download, progress bar.
